posts.author: Nilansh_Jain15
posts.community: Aether Industries: A Niche Leader in Specialty Chemicals with High Growth Potential
posts.text: When I wrote about Aether Industries in February 2025, my key takeaway was that this was an extremely interesting specialty chemical company, but one where the stock price was already discounting a lot of future growth. At the time, the company had all the right ingredients—strong promoter holding, niche chemistry capabilities, multiple sole-source products, and ambitious expansion plans. The only issue was that the financial performance had not yet caught up with the narrative. Over the last 15 months, that has started to change. The stock has moved from around ₹749 to about ₹1,110, deliverin…
